chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3641 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For katcha peshi. 08-02-2018 Mr. Meer Ahmed Mangrio advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto A.A.G. Sindh along with Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad, Inspector Ali Akbar Channa, SHO PS A-Section, Dadu and ASI Gul Hassan Bhutto PS Khuda Abad. Mr. Lutfullah Arain D.A.G. for Pakistan. Through this petition, the main grievance of the petitioner was that the nephew of the petitioner namely Ghulam Nabi was missing and his whereabouts are not known to the petitioner. Learned A.A.G. files comments along with photo copies of certain documents showing that the alleged detainee was confined in some criminal case and thereafter, he has been released on bail by the orders of trial Court. In view of the above, this petition has become infructuous which is disposed of accordingly. However, the petitioner if he has any grievance with regard to the illegal detention of alleged detainee by the police officials, he is allowed to file appropriate proceedings before the competent forum and if law permits, in accordance with law. However, official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with the law. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
